# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD for pull requests targeting commits on master branch only  # Workflow name  
on:
    pull_request:                                                  # Event that triggers workflow run, here is 'pull request' event type            
        types:                            
            - created                                    # Types of events to trigger this job (here we are listening for specific kinds)             
          branches:                                  # Listening only on these particular branch names          
            - master                               # Name or patterns matching `master` can be set up as the list, too.            
      pull_request_target:                        # Specify which target type to watch in a PR event (here we are watching specific types)             
        branches:                                  # Listening only on these particular branch names          
          - master                               # Name or patterns matching `master` can be set up as the list, too.            
      
jobs:                                                         # Defines an array of jobs to execute           
  build_and_test:                                            # Job name              
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest                                  # Platform where job will run (here we are running on latest Ubuntu version)             
      with:                                             # Specifies the step and its settings                
          node-version: '14.x'                          # Sets `node_version` variable               <---+   This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //| <<-----//>    (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)           <<--/----\
      
      steps:                                            # Array with job's commands to execute             
        - uses: actions/checkout@v2                          # Command used before all jobs run on a new machine          [1]         <<<-[ ]--->>>>>    This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //|<<-------->//     (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)
        - name: Node.js ${{ matrix.node_version }}            # Setting node version             <----+ <<----->>   [2]          This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //|<<--------->//     (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)
        - name: Install Dependencies                          # Command used to install app dependencies          <---+  -----      . <<------->>--.          This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //|<<--------->//     (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)
        - name: Test                                           # Executes tests on the project             <-----+    <--------   -----/ <<----      .          This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //|<<--------->//     (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)
        - name: Report Test Results                          # Posts test results back to PR          <-----+  --^---        >>    / <<<--/      .          This line only exists when you set it up in workflow as above  //|<<--------->//     (This is just for reference, not part of yaml code)
